marks.name: FCA Hex Mark
marks.description: Three-dimensional hexagonal shield with inner diamond void.

marks.name: Auricrux Crux Mark
marks.description: Circular gold medallion with star ring, diamond crux, stem, and crossbar.

marks.name: Auricrux Operator Portrait
marks.description: Photorealistic construction-executive portrait for dock, login, and academy presenter panels.

marks.name: Auricrux Humanoid Mark
marks.description: Geometric operator sigil bust with helmet visor, shoulder plates, and chest crux. Original artwork; not a depiction of any real person.

marks.description: Product trade name for SaaS workspace.
